data_provenance.note: Original data generator, no augmentation modifications

ensemble_config.notes: Baseline ensemble: 3 members, same architecture, different seeds (42, 1042, 2042)

pre_ensemble_baseline.description: Single MLP: wider layers + OneCycleLR + MSE+L1 loss (43 experiments)
pre_ensemble_baseline.note: Best result with single MLP before ensemble was introduced

idea_queue.rationale: Establish baseline with current ensemble structure before tuning
Find optimal member count balancing diversity vs training time

idea_queue.idea: Bagging: each member trains on random 80% of data
idea_queue.rationale: Data subsampling increases member diversity beyond seed variation

idea_queue.idea: Hyperparameter diversity: vary dropout (0.2-0.4) per member
idea_queue.rationale: Different regularization creates more diverse learned representations

idea_queue.idea: Hyperparameter diversity: vary learning rate per member
idea_queue.rationale: Different LR leads to different loss surface convergence points

idea_queue.idea: Architecture diversity: vary hidden layer widths per member
idea_queue.rationale: Heterogeneous architectures capture different aspects of the mapping

idea_queue.idea: Weighted ensemble: learn optimal member weights on validation set
idea_queue.rationale: Some members may be more accurate; weighting beats uniform average

idea_queue.idea: Snapshot ensemble: save checkpoints at different training epochs
idea_queue.rationale: Gets N models for cost of training one, using cyclic LR

idea_queue.idea: MC Dropout ensemble: single model with dropout at inference time
idea_queue.rationale: Cheapest ensemble — no extra training, just multiple forward passes

idea_queue.idea: Ensemble + CFP ensemble: also ensemble CFP models
idea_queue.rationale: If MLP ensemble helps, CFP ensemble may further reduce post-processing noise

idea_queue.idea: Knowledge distillation: train student from ensemble teacher
idea_queue.rationale: Compress ensemble knowledge into single model for FPGA deployment

idea_queue.idea: Data augmentation: add noise variations to training RSS
idea_queue.rationale: More robust ensemble members with augmented data diversity

key_findings_from_previous_sessions.session_1_2_summary: 43 experiments on single MLP. Best: wider MLP [512->4096] + OneCycleLR + MSE+L1 loss for both stages.
what_worked: Wider MLP layers (more capacity for 900-dim output)
MSE+L1 combined loss (L1 matches sparse target distribution)
what_failed: Activation changes (GELU, SiLU -- ReLU is optimal)
Sigmoid output (great SSIM but always hurts RMSE)
Wider CFP channels (MLP quality is the bottleneck)
